description: Chronological history, refined lineage, and artifact mappings of generative AI prompts

prompts.name: MLM Base Rank Fix Prompt
prompts.initialPrompt: Also Users when signing up are given leadership role first itself, make it like the User has base role, and only by ranking they can level up to become a leader
prompts.refinedPrompt: Adjust the role upgrade check inside `checkMlmRankUpgrade` to verify that `newLevel` is strictly greater than `minRankLevel`, preventing base level 1 members from immediately gaining the 'leader' role.
prompts.fullPrompt: Check the code in src/lib/binary-tree.ts and update checkMlmRankUpgrade so that user.role remains 'user' at the entry rank.
slicedPrompts: Find where role gets updated to 'leader' in checkMlmRankUpgrade.
Change the check user.role === 'user' && newLevel >= 1 to compare against minRankLevel dynamically.

prompts.name: Plan Leadership Eligibility Toggle Prompt
prompts.initialPrompt: add an option in Plan builder to toggle if Leadership is Eligible or not
prompts.refinedPrompt: Add 'isLeadershipEligible' boolean (default: true) to Plan model, UI toggle, API controllers, and check it in updateBinaryTreeVolumes & checkMlmRankUpgrade.
prompts.fullPrompt: Perform complete implementation: Add field to schema.prisma, update entity registry, add UI toggle, adapt PUT/POST API, and enforce checks in binary-tree functions.
slicedPrompts: Update plans API and binary-tree.ts checks.
